calendar.matters:
Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition Of Yogurt Time, Llc
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. AMIN KAZEMINI, Esq. of Law Offices of Amin Kazemini (tel: 707-328-2866) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. JOHN KEITH, Esq. of the Office of the Attorney General of California (tel: 213-269-6251) for the Defendants.

Hearing Re: RESPONDENT OFFICE OF TAX APPEALS, AND CALIFORNIA DEPT. OF TAX AND FEE ADMINISTRATION's Demurrer To Petition Of Yogurt Time, LLC.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order sustaining without leave to amend Defendants' demurrer to the complaint (see signed order for complete ruling). *****

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition Of Yogurt Time, Llc
Off Calendar Oct-07-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: RESPONDENT OFFICE OF TAX APPEALS, AND CALIFORNIA DEPT. OF TAX AND FEE ADMINISTRATION's Demurrer To Petition Of Yogurt Time, LLC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to October 15, 2024, on the court's motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
